summarization.a: The chart displays the relationship between the atomic ratio of P/(P + O + Al) and GPC (nm/cycle) as a function of TDMAP exposure time (in seconds).

a.question: What were the fixed exposure times, if the exposure time of the species in question was not varied?
a.answer: 15 s TDMAP; 10 s first O2 plasma; 15s TMA; 10 s second O2 plasma.

a.question: What is the P/(P + Al + O) ratio at saturation?

d.question: How does the GPC change as a function of TMA exposure?
d.answer: After about 10 seconds of TMA exposure, the GPC plateaus at a value of 0.12 nm/cycle.

b.question: How does the GPC change as a function of O2 plasma exposure?
b.answer: After about 2 seconds of O2 plasma exposure, the GPC plateaus at a value of 12 nm/cycle.
